brand.name: Paradigm Venture Group
brand.vertical: B2B/professional — enterprise tech consulting with healthcare specialization

summary: Paradigm Venture Group is an enterprise interoperability consultancy that connects disconnected legacy systems (EHR, ERP, CRM, billing) into a single real-time source of truth and layers AI-powered workflow automation (Friday_OS / Krista AI) on top. It serves healthcare operations and technology leaders — COOs, CIOs, VPs of Supply Chain, and Revenue Cycle Directors at hospitals, IDNs, and health systems — plus enterprise operations and sales-led organizations. Engagements are high-ticket, project- or retainer-based, and always begin with a discovery call rather than self-serve signup.

campaigns.name: Welcome & Onboarding
campaigns.objective: Convert a brand-new contact or inquiry into a booked discovery call by setting expectations, establishing authority, and defusing integration-risk anxiety from the first touch.
campaigns.trigger: New contact created — contact-form submission, 'Get Started' inquiry, or GPT-5 Readiness Audit request.
campaigns.segment: All new contacts; branch by stated pain point (revenue cycle / billing vs. supply chain & contracts vs. AI/sales ecosystem) when the intake form captures it.
campaigns.rationale: Every backbone campaign is missing and no nurture exists between first touch and a sales conversation — the fastest, highest-engagement win is a welcome that immediately routes a fresh lead toward the one revenue event that matters: a booked discovery call.

emails.purpose: Instant warm welcome: confirm we received them, set expectations for what a Paradigm engagement looks like, and deliver one quick win by pointing them to the free GPT-5 Readiness Audit as a low-risk first step.
emails.subject: Welcome to Paradigm — your first step to one source of truth
emails.preview: What happens next, and a free GPT-5 Readiness Audit to start.
keyPoints: Thank them and set expectations: a short discovery call, then a scoped plan — no rip-and-replace, no obligation
Defuse the #1 objection up front: we integrate with your existing EHR/ERP/CRM rather than replacing it
Offer the free GPT-5 Readiness Audit as the easiest first action, and invite a direct reply to a real person

campaigns.name: Consultation-to-Conversion
campaigns.objective: Move a contact who has shown interest but not yet booked from stalled to a scheduled discovery call by pairing peer proof with a direct answer to the integration-risk objection.
campaigns.trigger: Contact-form submission or audit request with no discovery call booked within ~3 days; behavioral milestone (pricing/solutions page revisit).
campaigns.segment: Active leads who haven't booked a call; branch by vertical (healthcare revenue cycle vs. enterprise operations vs. sales-led).
campaigns.rationale: PVG's entire revenue motion hinges on the discovery call, yet there's no nurture bridging the gap between an inquiry and a booked conversation — this is the core revenue play for a consult-close business.

emails.purpose: Re-engage a stalled lead with a concrete peer outcome and a head-on answer to 'will this break what we already have?', then make booking a call the single frictionless next step.
emails.subject: Will it break what you already have? (the honest answer)
emails.preview: How health systems unify EHR, ERP, and billing without ripping anything out.
keyPoints: Name the real hesitation — integration risk — and explain the semantic data layer that connects systems without replacing them
Show peer proof: an operations leader who killed manual billing reconciliation and got a single source of truth in weeks
Lower the stakes: the discovery call is a scoping conversation, not a sales pitch — bring your messiest workflow

campaigns.name: GPT-5 Readiness Audit Nurture
campaigns.objective: Educate audit downloaders over the long enterprise cycle, moving them from 'curious about AI readiness' toward a scoped interoperability conversation.
campaigns.trigger: GPT-5 Readiness Audit completed or requested.
campaigns.segment: Audit leads below the sales-ready threshold; branch by the primary system gap surfaced in their audit (data unification vs. workflow automation vs. revenue cycle).
campaigns.rationale: The GPT-5 Readiness Audit is PVG's only live top-of-funnel magnet and currently has zero follow-up — a stage-matched nurture turns a one-time download into pipeline instead of a dead end.

emails.purpose: Deliver the audit results and reframe the finding: AI readiness isn't a model problem, it's a data-unification problem — the real blocker is disconnected systems.
emails.subject: Your GPT-5 Readiness Audit — and the gap it really reveals
emails.preview: Most 'AI readiness' problems are actually interoperability problems.
emails.cta: See where your data silos are costing you
keyPoints: Deliver the audit and frame the core insight: AI can't act on data that's trapped in siloed EHR/ERP/billing systems
Explain that a unified source of truth is the prerequisite to any reliable AI workflow — not a nice-to-have
Tease the path forward — a 4–6 week AI Enterprise Ecosystem deployment — and invite a low-pressure scoping call

campaigns.name: Discovery Call Booking & Reminders
campaigns.objective: Maximize attended discovery calls by confirming, preparing, and reminding booked prospects so high-value sales conversations actually happen.
campaigns.trigger: Discovery call booked; upcoming scheduled call; no-show event.
campaigns.segment: Anyone with a scheduled discovery call or consultation.
campaigns.rationale: Discovery calls are the gateway to every PVG engagement, and reminders cut no-shows by ~35% on average — protecting calls already on the calendar is the cheapest revenue win available.

emails.purpose: Send 24 hours before the call: reduce no-shows, prime the prospect to come prepared so the conversation is productive, and offer a one-click reschedule instead of a silent drop.
emails.subject: See you tomorrow — a quick prep so we make it count
emails.preview: Bring your top workflow headache; we'll map the fix live.
keyPoints: Confirm the time and add-to-calendar; reduce no-show risk with a clear, friendly reminder
Tell them how to prep: come with the one system or workflow causing the most manual pain so we can scope it on the call
Remove friction with a one-click reschedule link — a moved call beats a missed one

campaigns.name: The Interoperability Brief (Value Newsletter)
campaigns.objective: Stay top-of-mind and build authority across PVG's long enterprise sales cycle without discounting, keeping non-ready leads and post-project clients warm.
campaigns.segment: All engaged contacts; suppress active onboarding and recently-dormant contacts (route those to a win-back track instead).
campaigns.rationale: Enterprise interoperability deals close on trust earned over weeks to months, and PVG has no thought-leadership program — a recurring value newsletter is the always-on engine that nurtures slow-moving leads and protects against one-and-done client drop-off.

emails.purpose: Flagship edition establishing PVG's authority: one sharp, useful idea on why healthcare AI initiatives stall, with an 80% value / 20% soft-offer balance and a single read-or-reply CTA.
emails.subject: Why most healthcare AI projects stall before go-live
emails.preview: It's rarely the model. It's the data that can't move between systems.
keyPoints: One useful idea per send: the operational reasons AI initiatives stall — fragmented data, manual hand-offs, no single source of truth
Demonstrate authority with a concrete mini-case of two siloed systems made to talk, framed around outcomes not features
Single soft CTA: read the full breakdown or reply with the integration challenge keeping your team stuck
